sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6168" key="a)mfotero/bleptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφοτερό-βλεπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n6168.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">looking on both sides, circumspect,</tr_> Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2003.tlg013:59" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">59</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
